app.name: Krishi-Verse
common.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.offline: You are offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.
welcome.subtitle: Sell your crop, buy direct, grow your farm — all in one app.
language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
otp.phoneHint: We'll send a 6-digit code by SMS.
otp.safety: For your safety, never share this OTP with anyone — not even Krishi-Verse staff.
otp.error.invalid: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.
otp.error.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
role.title: Choose your role
role.subtitle: Pick what fits you best. You can add more roles later.
role.farmer.desc: Sell your crops, book labour, manage your farm
role.buyer.desc: Buy fresh produce direct from farmers
profile.title: Tell us about you
listings.title: My Listings
listings.empty.title: No listings yet
listings.empty.message: Create your first listing to start selling.
orders.empty.title: No orders yet
orders.empty.message: Orders for your produce will appear here.
orders.action.conflict: This order already moved on. Refreshing.
orders.action.forbidden: You're not allowed to do this.
orders.cancel.title: Cancel this order?
pod.title: Proof of delivery
pod.help: Enter the OTP the buyer received and add a delivery photo.
pod.wrongOtp: That OTP is incorrect. Please check with the buyer.
pod.failed: Could not record delivery. Please try again.
pod.noShipment.title: No shipment to deliver
pod.noShipment.message: This order has no delivery assigned to you.
track.title: Track delivery
track.noShipment.title: Not shipped yet
track.noShipment.message: Tracking will appear once a delivery is assigned.
review.title: Rate this order
review.notEligible: This order can't be reviewed yet.
review.failed: Could not submit the review. Please try again.
report.title: Report a problem
report.help: Tell us what went wrong with this order. Our team will look into it.
report.filed: Report filed. We'll be in touch.
report.tooShort: Please add a little more detail.
report.already: A report is already open for this order.
report.failed: Could not file the report. Please try again.
addMoney.title: Add money to wallet
addMoney.failed: Payment failed. No money was deducted.
addMoney.pending: Payment is being confirmed. Your balance will update shortly.
addMoney.secure: 🔒 Secure payment via UPI, card, or netbanking.
wallet.txnEmpty.title: No transactions yet
wallet.payoutEmpty.title: No payouts yet
wallet.payoutEmpty.message: Money you withdraw will appear here.
withdraw.title: Withdraw money
withdraw.note: Payouts are sent to your verified bank account, usually within a few hours.
withdraw.requested: Withdrawal requested. We'll update you when it's paid.
withdraw.exceeds: Amount is more than your available balance.
withdraw.notAllowed: Withdrawal not allowed yet. Complete your verification (KYC) first.
withdraw.failed: Could not request the withdrawal. Please try again.
withdraw.noAccount.title: No payout account
withdraw.noAccount.message: Add a bank or UPI account to withdraw money. This is coming soon.
txnDetail.title: Transaction
kyc.title: Verification status
kyc.empty.title: No documents submitted
kyc.empty.message: Your verification documents and their status will appear here.
createListing.title: Create listing
createListing.queued: Saved. It will publish when you're back online.
createListing.error: Couldn't save. Please check the details.
createListing.voiceFailed: Couldn't hear that. Try again or type.
preview.title: Review & publish
editPrice.title: Update price
editPrice.label: New price per quintal (₹)
editPrice.conflict: Price changed elsewhere. Reopen and try again.
listings.boost.soon: Boosting needs wallet payment — coming soon.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty.title: You're all caught up
notifications.empty.message: New updates about your crops, orders and payments will appear here.
prefs.title: What you get notified about
prefs.quietHint: We won't disturb you during these hours.
buyer.home.title: Fresh produce
buyer.empty.title: No produce yet
buyer.empty.message: Listings will appear here as farmers post them.
buyer.noResults.title: No matches
buyer.noResults.message: Try a different search or fewer filters.
cart.title: Cart
cart.empty.title: Your cart is empty
cart.empty.message: Add produce from search or a listing.
cart.warn.unavailable: No longer available — remove to continue.
cart.warn.priceChanged: Price updated since you added this.
checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.totalsNote: Delivery, taxes and any discount are calculated and shown on your order.
checkout.failed: Could not place the order. Please try again.
checkout.changed: Something changed in your cart. Please review and retry.
address.title: Addresses
address.empty.title: No addresses yet
address.empty.message: Add a delivery address to check out.
buyer.orders.empty.title: No orders yet
buyer.orders.empty.message: Orders you place will appear here.
offer.title: My offers
offer.help: Propose a quantity and your price per unit. The seller can accept or counter.
offer.invalid: Enter a valid quantity and price.
offer.notAllowed: You can't make an offer on this listing.
offer.exists: You already have an open offer here.
offer.failed: Could not send the offer. Please try again.
offer.empty.title: No offers yet
offer.empty.message: Offers you make will appear here.
offer.notYourTurn: It's not your turn to act on this offer.
chat.title: Chats
chat.sendFailed: Message not sent. Tap to retry.
chat.empty.title: No chats yet
chat.empty.message: Start a chat from a listing.
chat.calling.title: Connecting…
chat.calling.message: We'll connect your call. Your number stays private.
auction.title: Auctions
auction.empty.title: No auctions
auction.emdNote: A refundable deposit (EMD) is held from your wallet while you're the bidder, and returned if you don't win.
auction.noBids: No bids yet — be the first.
auction.outbid: You've been outbid — bid again to stay in.
auction.bidTooLow: Your bid is below the minimum next bid.
auction.bidRejected: Bid rejected — someone may have bid higher. Refresh and try again.
auction.bidNotAllowed: You can't bid on this auction.
auction.bidFailed: Could not place the bid. Please try again.
createAuction.title: Create auction
createAuction.help: Set a starting price and how long the auction runs. Buyers bid up from there.
createAuction.invalid: Enter a valid price and duration (1–30 days).
createAuction.exists: This listing already has an auction.
createAuction.failed: Could not create the auction. Please try again.

seller.profilePending: Full seller profile and their other listings are coming soon.
